hall_of_fame.title: Consider re-licensing to AL v2.0, as RocksDB has just done
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: The open-source community's shift towards more permissive licenses like AL v2.0 makes re-licensing feasible.

hall_of_fame.title: Add upcoming GPT-3 model
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: GPT-3's massive success and widespread adoption make its integration crucial for the Transformers library.

hall_of_fame.title: DaemonSet dynamic/scaled resources based on node type
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: Dynamic resource allocation for DaemonSets is crucial for efficient utilization of diverse node environments in modern Kubernetes clusters.

last_resurrection.title: Feature Request: Idle model unload timeout (router mode / config.ini)
last_resurrection.one_line_why: The ecosystem shift towards more efficient resource management in large language models makes this feature viable in 2026.
